title: sylvie's pvp pack
description: a pvp modpack made with love <3
body:
# sylvie's pvp pack

a pvp modpack made with love <3

![screenshot of sylvie winning a duel](https://sylvie.lol/data/assets/f36e5b97-74de-40fd-9c8c-43f4ce18a365.png)

## credits

- [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop) and [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) - general reference for optimization stuffs
- [uku\('s pvp modpack\)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/ukupvp) - several pvp-centric mods (armor hud, bettershields, etc.)
> uku's pvp modpack has a few more mods than mine, so if you play a wider range of pvp gamemodes (especially crystal) you might wanna go with hers instead! (i play smp myself <3)
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) - proximity chat on servers that support it (like `mcpvp.club`)

## edits you may want to make

- simple voice chat isn't required on most servers, so if you don't want to hear your opponents you can get rid of it
- for content creators, [Flashback](https://modrinth.com/mod/flashback) can be used to keep a replay of your matches
